BuildLifeSupportStep1.title: Build life support
BuildLifeSupportStep1.description:
Running out of oxygen can be extremely dangerous for the crew, so we should probably set up some life support.

Select the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Atmosphere[/color] button in the [color=PURPLE]Building[/color] menu.

BuildLifeSupportStep2.description: Now select the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Life Support[/color] button.

BuildLifeSupportStep3.description:
Remember to check the information below to see what fuel this uses. In this case it uses [color=KHAKI]Ice[/color], which we can get from [color=KHAKI]Asteroids[/color].

Place the [color=KHAKI]Life Support[/color] within your ship on any available floor space.
